allow: PowerShell(npx supabase --version 2>$null; \(Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source)
PowerShell($configPath = "$env:APPDATA\\supabase"; if \(Test-Path $configPath\) { Get-ChildItem $configPath -Recurse | Select-Object FullName } else { "No Supabase config found at $configPath" })
